description: KabelDirekt Premium High Speed HDMI cable with Ethernet (HDMI 2.0a/b and backward compatible) - PRO Series Each cable has a tamper-proof sticker with a scan code which verifies the authenticity of the cable and therefore guarantees the full support for UHD/4K with HDR and expanded colour space. The Premium cables are tested additionally to ensure that they can achieve the full bandwidth of 18 Gbit/s of the HDMI 2.0b specification. They are also subjected to an EMI test to ensure that the interference impact from radio signals is minimized for these cables. The KabelDirekt PRO series combines the finest materials with first-rate manufacturing quality – always with a focus on perfect image and audio quality. Best possible production quality and maximum possible compatibility with any device with HDMI interface are a matter of course for this product. Supported functions: The certified Premium High Speed HDMI cable supports transfer rates of up to 18 Gbit/s and is 100% compatible with the latest HDMI standard 2.0a/b. It supports all image and sound formats offered by HDMI 2.0a/b. All additional HDMI functions are supported – e.g. Ethernet/Audio Return/CEC/Deep Color. The cable is 100% downward compatible. The quality features of the cable: - Perfect manufacturing quality - 8 mm outer diameter for sturdy cable quality - Precision connectors for secure fit - Gold-plated contacts for loss-free transfer and corrosion protection - Perfect, complete shielding (different layers of aluminium Mylar film and high-density aluminium mesh) - Highly flexible - Only high-quality materials used: Robust PVC sheath, nylon mesh, high-quality sturdy housings, conductors made from highest-purity, oxygen-free copper
